errors.ERR_FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.ERR_NOT_FOUND: The requested resource could not be found.
errors.ERR_INVALID_INPUT: The submitted input is invalid. Please review it and try again.
errors.ERR_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.ERR_QUOTA_EXCEEDED: The API quota may be exhausted. Please contact an administrator.
errors.ERR_UPLOAD_UNSUPPORTED_TYPE: This file type is not supported for upload.
errors.ERR_PLUGIN_NOT_FOUND: The requested plugin could not be found.
errors.ERR_NOTIFICATION_NOT_FOUND: The notification does not exist or has already been removed.
errors.ERR_VAULT_CATEGORY_EXISTS: A category with this name already exists.
errors.ERR_CREDENTIAL_UNREADABLE: This stored credential can no longer be decrypted. Please enter it again.
errors.ERR_INVITE_INVALID: The invitation code is invalid or has already been used.
errors.ERR_ITEM_NOT_FOUND: The requested item could not be found.
errors.ERR_CATEGORY_NOT_FOUND: The requested category could not be found.
errors.fallback: The action failed. Please try again later.

common.noReadableContent: No readable content is available yet.

auth.loginDescription: Sign in to continue browsing your feed, vault, and sync configuration.
auth.registerDescription: Enter the invitation code from your administrator to create your personal account and enter Pekno.
auth.initDescription: Pekno needs an initial bootstrap before first use.
auth.loginFailed: Sign-in failed. Please check your username and password.
auth.registerFailed: Registration failed. Please check the invitation code or try again later.
auth.initFailed: Initialization failed. Please try again later.

dashboard.title: Homelab Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: A single admin control room for quota alerts, queue backlog, plugin health, and multi-service logs.
dashboard.notAdmin: This account is not an administrator and cannot access the monitoring dashboard.
dashboard.apiUsageRadarDesc: Shows the last 7 days of API usage and highlights the current quota status.
dashboard.circuitTriggered: API circuit breaker triggered / quota exhausted
dashboard.circuitTriggeredDesc: This month already used {usedValue} / {limitValue} {unit}. New model requests will be blocked immediately.
dashboard.circuitWarningDesc: Currently using {usedValue} / {limitValue} {unit}. Please keep an eye on budget consumption.
dashboard.ragBacklogDesc: Items still waiting for summaries, OCR, or embeddings
dashboard.apiTodayCostDesc: Converted with the current primary currency
dashboard.abnormalPluginsDesc: Plugins currently marked Stale or Error
dashboard.pluginsWallDesc: Computed from the last successful sync, sync cadence, and recent execution result.
dashboard.noPlugins: There are no enabled plugins to monitor right now.
dashboard.terminalDesc: Dark terminal view with auto-scroll, level filtering, and line highlighting.
dashboard.noLogsForLevel: No log lines match the current filter.
dashboard.retryTriggeredDesc: {pluginName} has been added to the sync queue.

home.updatesReady: Pekno has refreshed and organized {count} items
home.aiSummaryMissing: No AI summary yet. Click the button to generate one.
home.emptyDescription: Try another keyword or make sure the backend services are running.
home.pdfUploaded: This PDF has been uploaded and can be opened or downloaded directly.
home.docPreviewUnsupported: Inline preview is not available for this file type yet, but you can still open it in a new tab.
home.addContentDesc: Actively ingest a local file or external link into the Pekno feed.
home.selectOrDropFile: Click to choose a file or drag it here
home.uploadSupportDesc: Supports PNG/JPG/WEBP/BMP, common video/audio formats, PDF, TXT, Markdown, and DOCX. GIF and other Office files are not supported.
home.uploadSummaryPlaceholder: Add a little context to make future search and recall easier
home.autoPluginHint: If the link has a clear signature, Pekno will switch to the matching plugin automatically.
home.saveKeyframeFailed: Unable to save this highlight snapshot. Please try again later.
home.aiSummaryRunningDesc: Please wait while the content is being analyzed and summarized.
home.aiSummaryCompletedDesc: The AI summary has been generated successfully.
home.uploadQueuedDesc: {title} is being analyzed by AI in the background.
home.linkedExistingAndFavorited: Linked to existing item and favorited

validation.gifNotSupported: GIF uploads are not supported. Please use PNG, JPG, WEBP, or BMP instead.
validation.staticImageOnly: Only PNG, JPG/JPEG, WEBP, and BMP static images are supported.
validation.commonVideoOnly: Only common video formats such as MP4, WEBM, MOV, M4V, MKV, and AVI are supported.
validation.commonAudioOnly: Only common audio formats such as MP3, WAV, M4A, AAC, FLAC, OGG, and WEBM are supported.
validation.docxOnly: Only DOCX is supported right now. Please convert other Office files to PDF, TXT, or Markdown first.
validation.unsupportedType: Only static images, common video/audio formats, PDF, TXT, Markdown, and DOCX uploads are supported.

vault.searchResultDirect: Search results are shown directly by relevance.
vault.organizedByCategory: Organize your highest-value saves with custom categories.
vault.categoryPlaceholder: For example: Research ideas / Papers / Product references
vault.noSearchResults: No saved content matched your search. Try another keyword.
vault.searchSorted: Results are ranked directly by relevance
vault.noFavoritesYet: You have not saved anything yet. Favorite a few items from the feed and come back to build your Vault.
vault.emptyCategory: There is no saved content in this category yet.
vault.screenshotQuoteTooltip: Drag to capture a region from the current PDF page and create a screenshot quote
vault.previousPageTooltip: Previous page. Supports PageUp or the Left Arrow key.
vault.nextPageTooltip: Next page. Supports PageDown or the Right Arrow key.
vault.pageInputTooltip: Use the mouse wheel here to flip pages quickly
vault.noReadableSelection: Select a saved item from the left panel.
vault.noReadableSearchSelection: There is no matching saved item available to read.
vault.transcriptUnavailable: This video does not have transcript text yet. Once its AI summary finishes, the transcript will appear here automatically.
vault.viewSummaryAfterSelect: Select content to inspect its summary.
vault.recordThoughtAfterSelect: Select content to start recording your thoughts.
vault.writeThoughtPlaceholder: Write an idea, summary, or action item...
vault.noThoughtsYet: There are no notes yet. Write the first one.
vault.deleteCategoryConfirm: Delete the category “{categoryName}”? Saved items inside it will return to “{fallbackCategory}”.
vault.saveDraftBeforeSwitchDesc: Your current note has not been saved yet. You can save it before switching, or discard it.
vault.pdfLoadFailed: Unable to load PDF. Please verify the file path and format.
vault.pdfRendering: PDF page is being prepared for rendering, please wait...
vault.pdfScreenshotHint: Drag to capture a region, press Esc to exit

install.title: Install New Plugin
install.uploadDesc: Upload a plugin ZIP to extend Pekno's capabilities
install.reviewDesc: Please review the plugin code and permissions carefully
install.clickToExpand: Click the button above to preview the main source code
install.riskNotice: I acknowledge this plugin is from the community and agree to bear the potential risk of running this code
install.riskDesc: Plugin code will run with full permissions on your server. Ensure the source is trusted.

settings.title: Pekno Settings
settings.languageDesc: Choose the UI language. The selection applies immediately and is persisted locally.

pluginCredentials.defaultDescription: Configure this plugin before running it.
pluginCredentials.statusAvailable: A reusable global credential is available
pluginCredentials.overrideHint: Saving a new value here will overwrite your global credential vault entry and bind it to this plugin.
pluginCredentials.secretAlreadySet: Already set (leave blank to keep unchanged)
pluginCredentials.syncQueuedDesc: {pluginName} has been added to the queue.
pluginCredentials.uninstallConfirmDesc: This will delete the plugin files and all saved plugin configuration. This action cannot be undone.

settings.pluginsDesc: Connect and configure third-party services so Pekno can sync and analyze your digital content automatically.
settings.modelsDesc: Manage model providers and the model assignments used for tagging, summarization, and vector retrieval.
settings.providerListDesc: As more providers are added later, you can still locate them quickly with search and capability filters.
settings.noMatchingProviders: No model providers match the current filters.
settings.providerConfigHint: It is best to finish provider onboarding first, then assign models to each workflow below.
settings.providerSaveFailed: Unable to save the model provider configuration.
settings.currentWorkflowsDesc: These settings already drive backend behavior. Changes here immediately affect tagging, summarization, and retrieval.
settings.multimodalPlaceholderDesc: We keep future multimodal workflow slots ready here so voice, vision, and video understanding can reuse this structure later.
settings.activeAssignmentGroupDesc: Model assignments that are already wired up and actively used.
settings.placeholderAssignmentGroupDesc: Reserved model assignments for future multimodal workflows.
settings.assignmentHint: This assignment is currently reserved as a UI and configuration placeholder. Its saved value will be reused directly when the feature lands.
settings.assignmentsSavedDesc: The new model assignment configuration is now active.
settings.assignmentsSaveFailed: Unable to save the system model assignments.

local_whisper.name: Local (Faster-Whisper)
local_whisper.description: High-performance local speech-to-text engine based on CTranslate2, optimized for deep learning, works offline with hardware acceleration.

ollama.name: Ollama
ollama.description: Connect to local or LAN Ollama, suitable for offline inference and self-hosted scenarios.

openai_compatible.name: OpenAI Compatible
openai_compatible.description: Generic provider compatible with OpenAI API, supports LM Studio, vLLM, One API, etc.

openai.name: OpenAI
openai.description: Official OpenAI services, suitable for GPT and text-embedding series models.

openrouter.name: OpenRouter
openrouter.description: Unified access to multiple model providers, ideal for quickly testing different models.

siliconflow.name: SiliconFlow
siliconflow.description: Popular regional inference platform, suitable for generic OpenAI compatible interfaces.

deepseek.name: DeepSeek
deepseek.description: Optimized for code and general reasoning, accessible via OpenAI compatible interface.

groq.name: Groq
groq.description: High-speed inference with ultra-low latency, ideal for real-time tagging and summaries.

together.name: Together AI
together.description: Cloud hosting for various open-source models, easy access to text and embedding families.

dashscope.name: DashScope (Qwen)
dashscope.description: Alibaba Cloud model service, capable of text, multimodal, and speech tasks.

zhipu.name: Zhipu AI (BigModel)
zhipu.description: Regional model platform with advanced vision and video understanding capabilities.

huggingface.name: Hugging Face
huggingface.description: World's largest open-source AI community. Configure Access Token to bypass rate limits when downloading heavy models like Whisper.

paddleocr_v5_cpu.name: PaddleOCR v5 (CPU)
paddleocr_v5_cpu.description: Local CPU-based OCR engine, suitable for image text extraction and scanned PDF recognition.

tagging.label: Tag Extraction Model
tagging.description: Responsible for generating keyword tags for content.

short_summary.label: Short Summary Model
short_summary.description: Generates concise summaries for feed cards.

embedding.label: Embedding Model
embedding.description: Responsible for text vectorization used in semantic search and similarity matching.

ocr.label: OCR Registry Engine
ocr.description: Handles image text extraction and background OCR for scanned PDFs.

speech_to_text.label: Speech-to-Text Engine
speech_to_text.description: Reserved for video audio extraction and podcast processing, converting speech to searchable text.

image_understanding.label: Image Understanding Engine
image_understanding.description: Extracts semantic info from cover images and screenshots, useful for image tagging and summaries.

video_understanding.label: Video Understanding Engine
video_understanding.description: Reserved for video content understanding, segment summaries, and timeline abstracts.

settings.billingDesc: Manage the monthly API limit and review the current model usage ledger.
settings.limitByTokensDesc: Limit the total number of LLM / embedding tokens used this month.
settings.limitByCostDesc: Limit the estimated API spend for the current month. Models without configured prices are recorded as zero.
settings.zeroDisablesLimit: Set this to 0 to disable quota blocking.
settings.billingHint: Limits are calculated by calendar month. Ollama, local OCR, and local Whisper still record usage, but their estimated cost is 0. Cloud models are priced using the temporary built-in rate table.
settings.billingLoadFailed: Unable to load the system billing settings.
settings.billingSavedEnabled: The new API quota settings are now active.
settings.billingSaveFailed: Unable to save the billing control settings.
settings.dataDesc: Manage the cached records collected by each plugin from external sources.
settings.noCachedData: There is no cached data right now.
settings.clearConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to clear all cached data under {source}? This action permanently deletes those records and cannot be undone.
settings.invitesDesc: Generate and track invitation codes for safely onboarding new users.
settings.noInvitesYet: No invitation codes have been generated yet.
settings.invitesLoadFailed: Unable to load the invitation list.
settings.inviteGeneratedDesc: {code} has been copied to the clipboard.
settings.copyInviteManuallyDesc: Please copy the invitation code manually.
settings.tokensDesc: Create personal access tokens (PATs) for MCP and other external AI agents. Deleting a token invalidates it immediately.
settings.adminTokenDesc: This token will access the system with administrator privileges. Only use it with trusted local agents or services.
settings.noTokensYet: No access tokens have been created yet.
settings.patScopeReadKnowledgeDesc: Allows external agents to read your knowledge base via web or MCP. This is usually the baseline requirement.
settings.patScopeWriteStarDesc: Allows agents to proactively save objects to your local star vault on your behalf.
settings.patScopeWriteSystemConfigDesc: Highly dangerous. Allows agents to directly change core settings like system billing limits and model assignments.
settings.tokenCreatedDesc: Copy and store it now. The full token will not be shown again after this dialog is closed.
settings.mcpDesc: After enabling MCP (Model Context Protocol), external AI clients such as Claude Desktop can search and operate on your Pekno data directly.
settings.streamableHttpDesc: Best for next-generation agent platforms, cloud gateways, and clients that support the newer single-endpoint MCP protocol.
settings.legacySseDesc: Best for clients that still rely on the older MCP SSE protocol, usually together with the JSON config below.
settings.mcpAuthorizationHint: All MCP requests must include Authorization: Bearer pekno_pat_xxx in the headers. Prefer Streamable HTTP when your client supports the newer protocol, and only use Legacy SSE when SSE is explicitly required.
settings.mcpTokenDesc: This access token is used for MCP authentication. Keep it safe. Deleting the token invalidates the connection immediately.
settings.noAvailableTokens: No access token is available yet. Please create one first.
settings.legacySseJsonConfigDesc: If your MCP client expects a legacy SSE-style JSON config, you can copy the block below directly.
settings.mcpToolGetRecentItemsDesc: Fetch feed items from the last N hours, with optional filtering by source type such as bilibili or github.
settings.mcpToolAddWatchLaterDesc: Add a specific item to the watch-later list, similar to clicking the star in the frontend.
settings.mcpToolFetchItemContentDesc: Fetch the full content or cached AI summary of an item, with intelligent formatting by article or video type.
settings.accountDesc: Manage the basic profile and security settings of the current account.
settings.passwordFormIncompleteDesc: Please fill in both the current password and the new password.
settings.modelsLoadFailed: Unable to load the model settings.
